mapper.insert: INSERT INTO hm_query.pricing_rule_flat ( id, tenant, last_synced_at, rule_id, name, rule_type, priority, discount_type, discount_value, active, active_from, active_to, conditions_json, applicable_categories_json, applicable_products_json, created_time, created_by, products_affected, conversions_30d, conversion_rate, revenue_impact, has_conflict, conflict_details ) SELECT pr.id, pr.tenant, NOW(), pr.id, pr.name, pr.rule_type, pr.priority, pr.discount_type, (pr.discount_value * 100)::INT, pr.active, pr.active_from, pr.active_to, pr.conditions, pr.applicable_categories, pr.applicable_products, pr.created_time, pr.created_by, -- products_affected: count products matching rule's applicable_products/categories COALESCE( CASE WHEN pr.applicable_products IS NOT NULL AND pr.applicable_products != '' THEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hm_product.products p WHERE p.id = ANY(STRING_TO_ARRAY(pr.applicable_products, ','))) WHEN pr.applicable_categories IS NOT NULL AND pr.applicable_categories != '' THEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hm_product.products p WHERE p.category_id = ANY(STRING_TO_ARRAY(pr.applicable_categories, ','))) ELSE (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hm_product.products) END, 0), -- conversions_30d: orders with discount matching this rule (simplified) COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT o.id) FROM hm_order.orders o WHERE o.discount_amount > 0 AND o.coupon_codes LIKE CONCAT('%', pr.name, '%') AND o.created_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days'), 0), 0, -- conversion_rate: computed in application layer -- revenue_impact: total discount amount attributed to this rule COALESCE((SELECT SUM(o.discount_amount) FROM hm_order.orders o WHERE o.coupon_codes LIKE CONCAT('%', pr.name, '%') AND o.created_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days'), 0), false, -- has_conflict: computed by conflict detection logic below NULL FROM hm_pricing.pricing_rules pr
mapper.update: UPDATE hm_query.pricing_rule_flat prf SET has_conflict = true, conflict_details = 'Floor rule ' || floor_rule.name || ' (min ' || floor_rule.discount_value || ') conflicts with discount' FROM hm_query.pricing_rule_flat floor_rule WHERE prf.rule_type = 'DISCOUNT' AND floor_rule.rule_type = 'FLOOR' AND prf.active = true AND floor_rule.active = true AND prf.applicable_categories_json = floor_rule.applicable_categories_json AND prf.id != floor_rule.id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO hm_query.price_change_log_flat ( id, tenant, change_time, product_id, product_name, sku, old_price, new_price, change_pct, change_reason, changed_by ) SELECT ph.id, ph.tenant, ph.created_time, ph.product_id, COALESCE(p.name, ''), COALESCE((SELECT pv.sku FROM hm_product.product_variants pv WHERE pv.product_id = ph.product_id LIMIT 1), ''), (ph.old_price * 100)::BIGINT, (ph.new_price * 100)::BIGINT, CASE WHEN ph.old_price > 0 THEN ((ph.new_price - ph.old_price) * 10000 / ph.old_price)::INT ELSE 0 END, ph.change_reason, ph.changed_by FROM hm_pricing.price_history ph LEFT JOIN hm_product.products p ON ph.product_id = p.id WHERE ph.created_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '90 days'
